scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/anime-parser build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/anime-parser typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json --noEmit
scripts.check:quality:code: bun run check:code:biome && bun run check:code:typecheck && bun run check:code:test && bun run check:code:fallow
scripts.check:quality:code:full: bun run check:code:biome && bun run check:code:typecheck && bun run check:code:test && bun run check:code:fallow:full && bun run check:code:react-doctor
